description: Style Note Spun from our irresistibly soft cotton, these are blissfully cosy T-shirts. These tees from myntra give a fresh twist to an off-duty staple making it ideal for your cool summer wardrobe. Style it with shorts or jeans, understated accessories and lace up casual shoes for perfect man-about-town nonchalance. Product Details Pack of 3 t-shirts - Red, Blue and Yellow Round neck, knitted T-shirts with short sleeves Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
